questions.q: Four Canadians were recently flown to British Columbia for a 21-day quarantine after being evacuated from a cruise ship stricken by an outbreak of which disease?
A Toronto specialist warned that Canadian hospitalizations for which group of vaccine-preventable illnesses have more than doubled since the pandemic?
options: Hepatitis A, Hepatitis B, and HPV

questions.q: Following a severe crash near the Surrey-Delta border in B.C., emergency crews were faced with a bizarre scene when a motorcycle was left dangling from what structure?
Students at Conestoga College recently reacted with frustration after a provincial audit revealed what major issue at the institution?
options: A massive data breach of student records

questions.q: Driven by global conflicts and an increase in pay, Canada's armed forces are currently seeing their biggest military recruitment surge in how many years?
